ohtani.title: Dodgers mount comeback for 5-3 win vs. Rockies
ohtani.blurb: Emmet Sheehan strikes out eight and Freddie Freeman drives in the go-ahead run as the Dodgers come back to beat the Rockies, 5-3

imanaga.title: Astros' three homers ignite 8-5 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Jake Meyers, Nick Allen and Christian Walker's home runs power Astros' 8-5 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Henry Davis' late-game homer lifts Pirates to 2-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Henry Davis' go-ahead solo home run in the 7th inning powers the Pirates to a 2-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Austin Martin, Brooks Lee lift Twins to series sweep
yoshida.blurb: Austin Martin's game-tying double and Brooks Lee's go-ahead single lead the Twins to a 6-5 win over the Red Sox to complete the series sweep

okamoto.title: Caissie, Sanoja, Stowers lead Marlins in 8-2 win
okamoto.blurb: Owen Caissie, Javier Sanoja and Kyle Stowers combine for six RBIs in the Marlins' 8-2 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Murakami's homer, Kay's Ks boost White Sox to 3-1 win
murakami.blurb: Munetaka Murakami's 18th homer of the year, and five Ks from Anthony Kay seal the deal in a 3-1 Memorial Day win over the Twins

matsui.title: Kyle Schwarber hits 21st homer in Phillies' 3-0 win
matsui.blurb: Kyle Schwarber hits his 21st homer and Jesús Luzardo strikes out six in the Phillies' 3-0 win over the Padres
